title: PUBLIC HOUSING - 211info
text: HOMES FOR GOOD PUBLIC HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about federally-subsidized private housing. Residents pay no more than 30% of their adjusted income for rent and utilities. 100 W 13th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Low-income families (two or more individuals), single people age 62 and older, or adults with disabilities. Income limits can be found on the website. Applicants are subject to a background check and other tenant screening criteria. Individuals with a registered sex offense will be denied. Criminal activities are reviewed on a case-by-case basis. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3755 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 682-3755 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Public Housing Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AGENCY-OWNED HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOMES FOR GOOD
